partial_progress.details: Analyzed derivability blocker in augmented_seed_consistent, identified gap between membership and derivability, recommended Options A/B/C

key_findings: chi.neg not in old_seed DOES NOT imply chi.neg not derivable from old_seed
chi.neg CAN be in u while satisfying boundary_resolution_set conditions
F(chi) can be in dc even when FF(chi) is not (counterexample: phi=F(p))
Recommended: Restrict boundary_resolution_set to require chi in u
